title: Comforts of Hestia
description: Comforts of Hestia is a modpack that improves client side performance and adds a lot of quality of life features.
body:
# Comforts of Hestia

Comforts of Hestia is a Minecraft modpack that makes Minecraft run smoother, look better, and be more fun to play. It includes mods like Sodium and Lithium which can all improve your game's performance. It also includes mods that add features like better animations, a world map, and shaders.

The modpack is named after Hestia, the Greek goddess of the hearth, home, and hospitality. Hestia was known for her warmth and kindness, and her presence was said to bring comfort and peace. The modpack is designed to create a similar experience for players, providing them with a more enjoyable and relaxing Minecraft experience.

Here are some of the things you can expect from the modpack:

* Smoother gameplay: Sodium and Lithium can all make your game run smoother, making it easier to play and enjoy.
* Better animations: Mods like Not Enough Animations and Better Animations Collection add more realistic and fluid animations to the game.
* Helpful features: Mods like Xaero's World Map and Visuality add helpful features that make the game easier to play.
* Beautiful shaders: Shaders like Complementary Shaders v4 can completely change the look of the game, making it more realistic and beautiful.

We are constantly looking for new mods to improve the pack, and we are eager to hear from the community on how we can improve the pack. If you have any suggestions, please let us know.

We hope you enjoy Comforts of Hestia!

Here are some specific examples of how the modpack can be improved:

* Adding more mods that improve performance.
* Adding more mods that add new features.
* Making the modpack more user-friendly.
* Fixing any bugs that are found.

We appreciate your feedback and suggestions!
Contact us @ coh-modpack@ph03n1x.xyz
